data.body: Implemented in 9a688aa8. Extracted _resolve_session(tracker) in transition.py (chain REBAR_SESSION_ID -> SESSION_ID -> _short_head -> 'unknown'); documented the additive (no-deprecation-warning) precedence in docs/config.md Back-compat section; added 4 precedence tests. Verified: pytest -k session (5 passed), make lint clean, force-close tests pass, grep REBAR_SESSION_ID docs/config.md.
